code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{NavLink,useLocation}from'react-router-dom';import'./Navbar.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const NAV_LINKS=[{to:'/',label:'Home'},{to:'/about',label:'About'},{to:'/projects',label:'Projects'},{to:'/skills',label:'Skills'},{to:'/resume',label:'Resume'},{to:'/contact',label:'Contact'},{to:'/job-tracker',label:'Job Tracker'}];function Navbar(){const[scrolled,setScrolled]=useState(false);const[menuOpen,setMenuOpen]=useState(false);const location=useLocation();useEffect(()=>{const handleScroll=()=>setScrolled(window.scrollY>20);window.addEventListener('scroll',handleScroll);return()=>window.removeEventListener('scroll',handleScroll);},[]);useEffect(()=>{setMenuOpen(false);},[location]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("nav",{className:`navbar ${scrolled?'navbar--scrolled':''}`,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"navbar__inner",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(NavLink,{to:"/",className:"navbar__brand",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"brand-initials",children:"BM"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"brand-name",children:"Balaji Maharajan"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("button",{className:`navbar__hamburger ${menuOpen?'open':''}`,onClick:()=>setMenuOpen(!menuOpen),"aria-label":"Toggle menu",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{className:`navbar__links ${menuOpen?'navbar__links--open':''}`,children:NAV_LINKS.map(_ref=>{let{to,label}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("li",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(NavLink,{to:to,end:to==='/',className:_ref2=>{let{isActive}=_ref2;return`navbar__link ${isActive?'navbar__link--active':''}`;},children:label})},to);})})]})});}export default Navbar;
